productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men White Casual Shoes
description: These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and aggressive design highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with these sleek referenced sneakers. Wear them with fitted denims and a tee. Throw on a tonal jacket for added style. Upper Textured synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and style Stitched syntehtic overlays for support Mild perforation detail all over Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Synthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfort Embroidered branding on tongue for style Mesh inner for breathable comfort Midsole Rubber midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfort Outsole Durable TPU outsole with honeycomb patterned grooves and an upraised heel shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
